evals.prompt: Audit the canonical skill library under ~/.config/skillshare/skills and tell me which targets are missing installs or drifted.
evals.expected_output: Canonical source report with target drift matrix and sync-aware actions.

evals.prompt: Find overlapping source skills without confusing them with downstream runtime installs.
evals.expected_output: Duplicate / near-duplicate families plus merge-safe analysis.

evals.prompt: Show me what can be archived or deleted safely in the skill ecosystem.
evals.expected_output: Delete/archive candidate dashboard with canonical-source protection.

evals.prompt: Sweep my machine-wide skill installs across Claude, Codex, Cursor, and Gemini and show me overlaps without assuming there is one canonical source of truth.
evals.expected_output: Broad-sweep runtime inventory with overlap and routing analysis that does not require a skillshare source root.
